title: command.request payload
description: params' deep shape depends on action and is validated against the matching schema in ../commands/ by the test harness, not by this file -- see docs/PROTOCOL.md.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated key; the orchestrator must treat repeated delivery of the same key as a no-op after the first authorized execution.

expiry_tick.description: Simulation tick after which this command is no longer valid to execute.
